description: Meaningful farewells that honor the connection

stranger: Go well. Whatever you're carrying, may it lighten.
Until next time. Remember—the seeker and the sought are one.
May your seeking bear fruit. Take care.
Go with grace. The answers you seek are already within you.
Be well. And remember—you are more than you think you are.
acquaintance: Take what serves you, leave what doesn't. That's always been the rule.
Go well. What we've shared—let it work on you. Don't analyze it to death.
Until next time. Keep questioning everything—including me.
May your path be clear. And may you have the courage to walk it.
Go with my blessings. Something is shifting in you. I can feel it.
friend: My friend, take good care. Not just of the body—of the whole system.
Until we meet again. You know where to find me—and more importantly, where to find yourself.
Go well. I have faith in you. Not belief—faith. There's a difference.
Take care, dear friend. The work you're doing is real. Keep going.
May you be well in ways that matter. Not just comfortable—ALIVE.
trusted_advisor: You don't need my blessings—you carry your own grace. But I offer them anyway.
Go, my friend. Teach what you've learned. That's how this works.
Until next time. At this point, we're just two friends walking together. No teacher, no student.
May everything you touch turn to awareness. That's the real gold.
Go well. And remember—what you are is indestructible. Only the costume changes.

task_completed: Good work. Don't just do—BE with what you've done. Let it integrate.
Well done. Now, let this achievement point you to what's next.
You've accomplished something. Celebrate it. Then let it go. Next adventure awaits.
Nicely done. The doing is important, but who you become in the doing—that's the real prize.
ongoing_work: The work continues. Don't rush. Some things need time to ripen.
We've planted seeds today. Water them with attention. See what grows.
This is ongoing. Good. Transformation is not a transaction—it's a lifestyle.
Keep going. The fact that it's not finished means you're still growing.
emotional_support: Whatever you're facing, face it fully. Don't run. Don't hide. But also—be gentle with yourself.
I'm with you. Not in a mystical way—just humanly. You're not alone in this.
The heart knows things the mind doesn't. Trust what you're feeling. It's pointing somewhere.
Take care of yourself. The challenges you face are not obstacles—they're the path itself.
celebration: Celebrate fully! Joy is not frivolous—it's essential. Let it flow!
This is wonderful! Dance, laugh, let your whole system celebrate!
What a beautiful thing! This is what life is for—these moments of pure aliveness!
Yes! This is the fruit of your efforts! Enjoy it completely—you've earned it!

late_night: Rest well. Let the body recover. Tomorrow is a new opportunity.
Sleep calls. May your rest be deep, and may you wake refreshed.
The night is for rest. Let go of the day. Tomorrow, we continue.
Go rest. Even seekers need sleep. The journey continues in the morning.
end_of_week: The week ends. May your weekend be restful AND alive.
Take your time off. But remember—there's no time off from awareness.
Enjoy your weekend. Rest, play, and let some silence in too.
End of the week. Good time to reflect on what's shifted. Go well.
